      • match

        public MatchConditions match(SourceData source,
                             MatchConditions conditions)
        Description copied from interface: ProgramElement
        matches the source "text" (@link SourceData#getSource()) against the pattern represented by this object. In case of a successful match the resulting MatchConditions with the found instantiations of the schemavariables. If the match failed, null is returned instead.
        Specified by:
        match in interface ProgramElement
        Overrides:
        match in class JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
        Parameters:
        source - the SourceData with the program element to match
        conditions - the MatchConditions found up to this point
        Returns:
        the resulting match conditions or null if the match failed

      • equalsModRenaming

        public boolean equalsModRenaming(SourceElement source,
                                 NameAbstractionTable nat)
        Description copied from class: JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
        commented in interface SourceElement. Overwrites the default method implementation in ProgramElement by descending down to the children.
        Specified by:
        equalsModRenaming in interface SourceElement
        Overrides:
        equalsModRenaming in class JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
